name: Kaki Izakaya
address: G/F, 33 Tong Chong Street, Quarry Bay, Hong Kong

address: Chung Hing Mansion, 13 Pan Hoi Street, Quarry Bay, Hong Kong

address: Shop 5, G/F, 25 New Praya, Kennedy Town, Hong Kong
